features: Eco Friendly, Plastic Free And Biodegradeable - Our zero waste bamboo, natural rubber hair brush and cardboard packaging are 100% biodegradable, recyclable, vegan friendly and cruelty free.
Removes Knots And Tangles - Our easy grip, soft touch paddle hair brush is your one way ticket to silky-smooth hair. Our spaced out bristles guarantee a faster blow dry and pain free detangling.
Wet And Dry Detangling - Suitable for all hair types. Detangle wet or dry hair in seconds. Watch in wonder as it works its magic on thick, thin, curly, wavy or straight hair. We've got you covered!
Scalp Massager- Our soft wooden bristles and natural, flexible rubber cushion gently massage and stimulate hair follicles. This increases blood flow circulation and promotes good scalp health.
Frizz Fixer - Our natural wooden bristles reduce friction compared to plastic brushes, keeping static at bay and minimising breakage for hair thats frizz free and fabulous!
